Overview
General Psychology 20
Assignment #8 Overview
 Section 4:  Neurosis
Objectives:
• To gain an awareness of the choices available in life in a variety of dimensions
• To understand some of the consequences of our choices
• To have knowledge of the careers in psychology and be aware of the personal
elements that apply to those career choices
1.
